pr.title: Scaffold and harden AI futures trading bot
pr.body: ## Summary - Add FastAPI backend scaffold with trading engine, risk/safety controls, AI trade filter, CCXT exchange abstraction, strategies, backtesting, database models, and migrations. - Add Docker Compose deployment for API, worker, frontend, PostgreSQL, and Redis. - Harden paper-trading deployment with API key auth, restricted CORS, Redis auth, required DB/Redis secrets, Alembic psycopg driver, non-root containers, readiness checks, worker heartbeat/scanning loop, and persisted paper trades/dashboard data. - Force the rendered dashboard component to call `GET http://81.27.108.159:8000/api/v1/dashboard/summary` directly inside `useEffect()` on page load. - Ensure the dashboard summary request sends `x-api-key: testkey123`, logs `Fetching dashboard summary...`, logs `Dashboard API response:`, and uses `console.error` on failures. - Map dashboard cards directly to returned backend summary JSON fields: `live_pnl`, `open_positions.length`, `risk_exposure_pct`, `ai_confidence_score`, and `exchange_connection_status`. - Remove hardcoded placeholder card values from the primary dashboard display path, while keeping loading and visible API error states. - Add realistic paper trading simulation with fake execution, simulated balance, long/short positions, leverage-aware margin, live market price marking from exchange OHLCV, simulated stop-loss/take-profit closures, PnL updates, and trade history dashboard integration. - Add structured Telegram alerts for startup/shutdown, simulated trades, errors, warnings, strategy signals, worker loop failures, and fatal worker crashes. - Enforce production paper/sandbox mode by rejecting `LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED=true`, `PAPER_TRADING_ENABLED=false`, or `EXCHANGE_SANDBOX=false` at startup. - Merge latest `origin/main`; current conflict was a simple dashboard conflict where `main` had the previous demo fallback dashboard version and this branch had the latest live API field mapping. Resolved by keeping this branch's live mapping version. ## Validation - `npm run build` in `frontend` - Merge validation confirmed live card mappings remain: - `summary?.live_pnl` - `openPositions.length` - `summary?.risk_exposure_pct` - `summary?.ai_confidence_score` - `summary?.exchange_connection_status` - Merge validation confirmed required request behavior remains: - `Fetching dashboard summary...` - `Dashboard API response:` - `"x-api-key": API_KEY` - Merge validation confirmed old hardcoded demo values (`demoPositions`, `demoTrades`, `dailyPnL: 127.45`, `balance: 10000`) are not in the primary dashboard source - `git diff --check` - Previous validations include backend compile, route protection, paper simulation smoke tests, Telegram alert smoke tests, and production safety checks - `docker compose config` could not be run because Docker is not installed in this environment.
pr.author: detvildevestendk-code
